description: Emissions in tCO~2~ per MWh of primary energy (e.g. methane has 0.2 tCO~2~/MWh~thermal~).
Color for plotting (e.g. `matplotlib` [named colors](https://matplotlib.org/stable/gallery/color/named_colors.html) or hexadecimal color codes like "#AB9812")
Descriptive name for statistics and visualisations (e.g. "Natural Gas" for carrier `gas`)
Maximum new installed capacity per investment period
Maximum capacity ratio for new installed capacity per investment period
Endogenous learning rate: relative capital cost reduction per doubling of cumulative installed capacity. A value of 0 disables learning for the carrier.
Only used with endogenous learning. Specific investment cost at the initial (global) capacity, i.e. the starting point of the learning curve.
Only used with endogenous learning. Cumulative capacity already installed today, used as the lower bound and reference point of the learning curve.
Only used with endogenous learning. Maximum cumulative installable capacity, i.e. the end point of the piecewise linearisation of the learning curve.
